description: VERIFIED LIVE: YouTube via content-script DOM extraction (no API key). YouTube's data API is signed/quota-gated, but the rendered page holds the data — these tools read it straight from the DOM of your open YouTube tab. Navigate the tab to a search results / feed / playlist page, then call the matching tool. Tested live by Claude Code on a search page: 4 videos with title, url, channel and view/age metadata extracted correctly.

tools.name: youtube_search_results
tools.description: Videos on the current YouTube SEARCH results page (navigate the tab to /results?search_query=… first). Returns title, url, channel and view/age metadata. VERIFIED.

tools.name: youtube_feed
tools.description: Videos in the current grid FEED (home, subscriptions, a channel's Videos tab, or a playlist page). Navigate the tab there first. Returns title, url and channel.

tools.name: youtube_playlist_items
tools.description: Videos listed on the current PLAYLIST page (navigate the tab to /playlist?list=… first). Returns title and url.
